title: Blocky 3D Replacements
description: A collection of 3D iron bars, ladders, rails, and more to replace the paper-thin ones. Also includes cobweb and dripstone models.
body:
## Blocky Replacements

This resource pack replaces every paper-thin model, such as the iron bars and ladders, with a new blocky model that better represents their collision-box while retaining the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft. Each one has been carefully crafted to appear clean and unobtrusive from all angles. More showcases of the replaced blocks can be found in the gallery tab.

### <u>Includes:</u>
☑ Proper texture-culling\
☑ No additional textures\
☑ No texture fighting/z-fighting

## Showcase
![Showcase of Blocky Iron Bars as decoration in an entranceway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g4jCGLiE/images/93f069a83aadd01dd6379b83e6183d30b2a7cbf4.png)
![Showcase of Blocky Ladder at the bottom of a pit with ladders leading upward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g4jCGLiE/images/1e4884c17bb97601a652f3402c2227367d03802c.png)
![Showcase of Blocky Rails with all four rail types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g4jCGLiE/images/f8f9162b82a7e6a9eb800d0bb4c89275c789b1ea.png)
